title: Unity (U) Q3 2024 earnings results beat revenue expectations on smaller than expected loss
text: Revenue Results: Unity's strategic portfolio revenue was $429 million in Q3 2024, which exceeded their guidance of $415-$420 million. This represented a 2% year-over-year decline but a 1% sequential increase from Q2. Total reported revenue came in at $447 million for Q3 2024, surpassing analyst estimates of $430.37 million, though this represented an 18% year-over-year decline. Performance Highlights: Unity's adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $92 million, exceeding guidance of $75-$80 million. The company reported a GAAP EPS loss of $0.31 per share. The company's subscription revenue grew 12% year-over-year, with Create Solutions segment revenue increasing 5% year-over-year. Key Developments: Unity successfully launched Unity 6, described as the best performing and most stable version to date. Pricing increases effective January 1, 2025, are expected to drive double-digit growth in subscription revenue as customers renew or upgrade.
